meaning: adj.爽朗的,活泼的,爽快的n.切东西的人或工具 vt.使高兴起来vi.高兴起来,吱吱叫,喋喋而言
examples: He'd stop at the chipper on the way home.
That firms are feeling less chipper is not so surprising.
He's frail but chipper as he receives guests in his book-lined study.
While using a shovel to push branches into a wood chipper, he was pulled in and killed.
That meeting has framed our relationship: the chipper business rep and the fretting journalist.
